channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.mmorpg.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.mmorpg.com

item.title: Stars Reach Takes Us Into Their Living Roadmap Before a Fireside Chat With Reveals
item.content:encoded:
Stars Reach’s Raph Koster is breaking down the structure and updates of their living roadmap, including how the team uses it, and how to get a better understanding of development, priorities, and what’s coming next. There’s also a Fireside chat coming this weekend to explain not just more of Playable Worlds’ roadmap system but to actually dive into what they’re working on.

Their living roadmap is designed as an overviewFestival to everyone so you can see exactly what's going on at any time, the status of that particular entry, as well as future plans. In the video, we get a helpful overview.

The roadmap itself starts with an “update history” column,  which simply shows what they've already worked on and released.  It makes sense that this column is all the way to the left because as you go further to the right, those items are further away from development. Very long-term development goals and plans are in the long-term map on the right. As the team starts to work on various features and improvements those items get moved to the left and those sections get updated over time. 

When they start to work on something, it goes into “Our Next Priorities”. When you start seeing pictures and extended notes, then a feature is in active development. Everything they are working on moves to the left in steps as they continue phases and you can follow development like that.

The video goes into all of the columns and phases, even though none of this is on any sort of guaranteed timeline and all of it is up for change depending on need. Additionally, their next priorities column and anything else in an earlier state of development or even pre-development is something they're particularly looking for feedback on because catching some issues early will save them time and money in the end and hopefully lead to a better game.

You can look at the roadmap at any time, there is a fireside chat tomorrow, Saturday, May 9th, with Raph Koster where Into some reveals, including new and a changed gameplay features, quality of life improvements, some more on skill point allocation, and more that's on the way. 



https://www.mmorpg.com/news/stars-reach-takes-us-into-their-living-roadmap-before-a-fireside-chat-with-reveals-2000138014
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
